$description: SKILL CONVENTION (not DTCG): brand-style block consumed by the prompt door. Lives at token-file root under $extensions. Unknown keys warn, never fail. Worked example: the ai-design (Goal-Driven Design) brand.

community.design-tokens.brand.imageryStyle: flat vector illustration with dot-grid and stipple textures; geometric, code-native; no photorealism, no 3d renders
community.design-tokens.brand.voice: an editorial argument, not a sales pitch — states a thesis and demonstrates it
avoid: pure black or pure white backgrounds
community.design-tokens.brand.negativePrompt: photorealistic, 3d render, neon glow, bokeh, gradient background, stock photo, watermark
